TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Empire of Men Faction.

Translations.Comment: Reich = empire/realm. Plural form maintains the grand, multi-kingdom nature.
Kaiserlich = imperial. Schwertkämpfer = swordsmen for clarity.
Compound word for knights on foot, as opposed to mounted knights.
Hellebardiere = halberdiers. Professional term for halberd-wielding troops.
Speerkämpfer = spearmen. Standard military formation troops.
Heavy cavalry, the elite of the empire. Direct and powerful.
Leichte Kavallerie = light cavalry. Scouts and skirmishers.
Armbrustschützen = crossbowmen. More powerful ranged troops.
Direct translation of cannon. Heavy artillery.
Koloss (colossus) conveys massive war machine. Alternative to anglicized 'Dreadnought'.
Standard German term for gryphon. Majestic imperial symbol.
Dragon under imperial control. Ultimate flying unit.
Traditional German military rank for captain. Battle-hardened leader.
Kommandant = commander. Leader of knightly orders.
Zauberer = wizard. Magic user in service of the empire.
